data.body: Evidence for AC 'make lint && make typecheck && make test pass': verified locally — make lint clean (ruff+format+zizmor+actionlint), make typecheck clean (mypy 327 files), full suite green. Also by CI: Gerrit change 717 (https://rebar.solutions.navateam.com/c/rebar/+/717) carries Verified+1 (CI build/test/lint/typecheck on GitHub Actions across py3.11/3.12/3.13 + macOS).
